videos.headline: Caleb Williams throws 3 INTs for first time in USC's loss to Notre Dame
videos.description: Caleb Williams throws a trio of interceptions in the first half as USC falls to Notre Dame 48-20.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Caleb Williams throws 3 INTs for first time in USC's loss to Notre Dame) 2023/10/14 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Caleb Williams' early INT leads to a Notre Dame touchdown
videos.description: Caleb Williams throws an interception on USC's opening drive and Gi'Bran Payne turns it into points with Notre Dame's first touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Caleb Williams' early INT leads to a Notre Dame touchdown) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Caleb Williams throws 3rd INT of the first half for USC
videos.description: Caleb Williams gets picked off for the third time in the first half against Notre Dame.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Caleb Williams throws 3rd INT of the first half for USC) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sam Hartman hits Chris Tyree in stride for a 46-yard TD
videos.description: Chris Tyree extends Notre Dame's lead over USC with a 46-yard catch-and-run touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sam Hartman hits Chris Tyree in stride for a 46-yard TD) 2023/10/14 ESHEET
